session.user:

session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the codespace-related test files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on codespace unit tests

session.assistant: Let me get the full summary:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest with verbose output to see test summary

session.tool_result:

pytest passed: 74 tests passed in 0.99s
